titles.title: I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't Jesus Christ Gods Only Son Fought The Battle And He Won I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't Since The Holy Ghost Came In Gave Us Power Over Sin I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't For The Lord Is On Our Side And We'll Not Be Denied I Will Not Be Defeated No I Won't
